description: jaguar Casual fragrance for men from Jaguar has a stylish flask and was launched in 1988. The notes are a blend of basil, lavender, grapefruit and gardenia accompanied by cedar, spruce, leather and fern. It is recommended for romantic wear or off duty events.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
